basic.description:
{Basic Scouting}
Allows your hero to see 1 square further into the shroud and earn 1 mithril per day

advanced.description:
{Advanced Scouting}
Allows your hero to see 3 square further into the shroud and earn 1 mithril per day

expert.description:
{Expert Scouting}
Allows your hero to see 5 square further into the shroud and earn 1 mithril per day
